dimensions.name: correctness
dimensions.evidence: AC-7 is not fully met: `bin/frw.d/scripts/upgrade.sh` only migrates `.claude/furrow.yaml` and scaffolds `promotion-targets.yaml`; a fixture with legacy `.claude/specialists/legacy.md` leaves no `XDG_CONFIG_HOME/furrow/specialists/*` after `frw upgrade --apply`.

dimensions.name: test-coverage
dimensions.evidence: New config-cleanup paths are exercised by focused integration tests that all passed: `test-config-resolution.sh`, `test-specialist-precedence.sh`, `test-promotion-targets-scaffolding.sh`, `test-source-todos-handoff.sh`, `test-upgrade-migration.sh`, `test-upgrade-idempotency.sh`, `test-install-xdg-override.sh`, and `test-legacy-migration.sh`.

dimensions.name: spec-compliance
dimensions.evidence: The spec requires `source_todo` and `source_todos` to be mutually exclusive, but `bin/frw validate-definition` accepts a definition containing both fields (`definition.yaml is valid`), so the interface contract is not enforced.

dimensions.name: unplanned-changes
dimensions.evidence: `config-cleanup` ownership in `definition.yaml`/`plan.json` does not include `install.sh`, `tests/fixtures/make-legacy-install.sh`, or the `tests/integration/test-upgrade-*.sh` files, yet those files changed and no deliverable-specific ownership exception is recorded.

dimensions.name: code-quality
dimensions.evidence: Linting is not clean: `shellcheck` exits 1 on the changed surfaces, including SC2097/SC2098 in `tests/integration/test-promotion-targets-scaffolding.sh`, `test-upgrade-migration.sh`, and `test-upgrade-idempotency.sh`, plus SC2129 in `bin/frw.d/install.sh`.
